ours.title: Genius of Modern Music Vol. 1
ours.label: Various
ours.albumDNA: Recorded in 2013, Genius of Modern Music Vol. 1 showcases Thelonious Monk at the height of their creative powers, offering one of the finest expressions of Bebop. Genius of Modern Music Vol. 1 remains a landmark of Bebop, cementing Thelonious Monk's reputation as one of the defining voices of the era and earning consistent praise from critics worldwide.
